# Pull Request Template

## Summary
Briefly describe the changes made in this pull request.

## Related Issue
Fixes #[issue_number] (if applicable)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING guide.
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] I have run `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` and fixed any warnings.
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines.
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md if necessary.
- [ ] I have considered the security implications of my changes.

## Screenshots (if applicable):
<!-- Add screenshots or screen recordings to help illustrate the problem or solution. -->

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem or solution here.
